LLM: Qwen3.5:4b / 9b (Ollama, Metal GPU) + Zhipu / Groq Cloud
Embeddings: nomic-embed-text-v1.5 (768-dim, fastembed)
Vector DB: PostgreSQL + pgvector (IVFFlat index)
Reranking: bge-reranker-base cross-encoder
Cost ML: CatBoost 1.2 + SHAP TreeExplainer + Ridge
OCR: PaddleOCR (Python 3.13.x)
Backend: FastAPI + LangGraph State Graph (11-node intent + 10-node pipeline)
Frontend: Next.js 16 + TypeScript (App Router, port 3123)
Sandbox: Docker + E2B code execution sandbox
